predeclared: 2026-06-09, ledger v4 (Exp 54). Two changes from v3: (1) FROZEN REFERENCES — all expectations derive from the declared reference state only, never from the epoch under test (Exp 53 design rule #3); (2) noise margin scales with the expected-drift magnitude: +/-(0.015 + 0.5*|center|).

conviction_drift.formula: center = (eq_share - cur_share) * steps/(total_counts + steps); margin = 0.015 + 0.5*abs(center); band = (center - margin, center + margin)

favorite_changed.conditional: scored only if pre-epoch gap_share = (counts[favorite]-counts[runner_up])/total > 0.03; else DISABLED (favorite identity is inside the epoch noise envelope, Exp 52 diagnosis)
